mapper.sql: id, type, gridurl, gridId, colId, colName, colHeader, colAlign, colOrder, colWidth, colEnterOrder, is_hidden, is_necessary, is_export, is_sortable, is_print, is_copy, is_frozen
mapper.select:
select colset.type from cf_srm_gridcolset colset where gridurl=#{gridColSetMainDto.gridUrl} and gridId=#{gridColSetMainDto.gridId}
and reference=#{gridColSetMainDto.userCode} and colset.type="SSUser"
and reference=#{gridColSetMainDto.groupId} and colset.type="SSGroup"
and reference=#{gridColSetMainDto.hospId} and colset.type="SITE"
group by colset.type

select id as rowId,colName as name,colHeader as header ,colAlign as align,colWidth as width, colEnterOrder as enterSort, is_hidden as hidden, is_necessary as necessary, is_export, is_sortable, is_print, is_copy, is_frozen as frozen from cf_srm_gridcolset where gridurl=#{gridColSetMainDto.gridUrl} and gridId=#{gridColSetMainDto.gridId}
and reference=#{gridColSetMainDto.userCode} and type="SSUser"
and reference=#{gridColSetMainDto.groupId} and type="SSGroup"
and reference=#{gridColSetMainDto.hospId} and type="SITE"
order by colOrder
mapper.delete: delete from cf_srm_gridcolset where gridurl=#{gridColSetMainDto.gridUrl} and type=#{gridColSetMainDto.moduleType} and gridId=#{gridColSetMainDto.gridId}
